{"query":"Megadoc Mike Figgis documentary Megalopolis table read rehearsal actors","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1417,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://deadline.com/2025/09/megadoc-director-mike-figgis-interview-1236553452/","title":"'Megadoc' Director Mike Figgis On Coppola & Making Of 'Megalopolis'","content":"The Megadoc director also tells us about his interactions behind the scenes with Jon Voight, cast as Hamilton Crassus III (an actor Figgis describes as “the most charming, articulate, right-wing Republican Trump supporter”) and “loose cannon” Aubrey Plaza, who stars in the intriguing role of Wow Platinum.
That’s on the new episode of Doc Talk, hosted by Oscar winner John Ridley (12 Years a Slave, Shirley) and Matt Carey, Deadline’s documentary editor."},{"url":"https://letterboxd.com/film/megadoc/","title":"‎Megadoc (2025) directed by Mike Figgis • Reviews, film + cast • Letterboxd","content":"From Oscar-nominated Mike Figgis, Megadoc gives audiences an unfiltered and intimate look at the making of Francis Ford Coppola’s epic sci-fi drama Megalopolis.
Show us all the footage from the table reads and test footage with DeNiro and Gosling!"},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Megadoc","title":"Megadoc - Wikipedia","content":"The documentary includes footage of a 2001 table read of Megalopolis with its then-prospective cast of Uma Thurman and Robert De Niro, and 2003 rehearsals with Ryan Gosling, from the extensive archive material Coppola offered for the documentary.
The film received a limited theatrical run in US cinemas from September 19, 2025, with Utopia in partnership with Lionsgate re-releasing Megalopolis in conjunction.
Peter Bradshaw considered Megadoc avoiding allegations of Coppola's inappropriate behavior towards female extras to be a flaw, but found it an engaging and successful documentary, praising Figgis' ability to show the working relationships between Coppola and a mixed variety of actors."},{"url":"https://www.indiewire.com/news/breaking-news/megadoc-first-look-mike-figgis-coppola-megalopolis-1235140946/","title":"'Megadoc' First Look: Mike Figgis on Coppola's Making of 'Megalopolis'","content":"Mike Figgis directs “Megadoc” about the making of Coppola’s self-funded $120 million epic.
“Megalopolis” actors Driver, Plaza, Emmanuel, Voight, Dustin Hoffman, Giancarlo Esposito, Chloe Fineman, Shia LaBeouf, and Laurence Fishburne appear in “Megadoc,” as well as Coppola collaborators Talia Shire and Robert De Niro.
Figgis previously helmed the Oscar-nominated “Leaving Las Vegas” and is known for directing episodes of “The Sopranos” and “The Affair.”
Daily Headlines covering Film, TV and more."},{"url":"https://variety.com/2025/film/global/megadoc-trailer-mike-figgis-coppola-megalopolis-1236504423/","title":"Megadoc Trailer: Mike Figgis Explores Making of Coppola's Megalopolis","content":"So says Francis Ford Coppola in the first full trailer for “Megadoc,” Mike Figgis‘ making-of doc about the legendary director’s “Megalopolis.” Utopia will be releasing “Megadoc” in select cinemas on Sept.
Described as a “raw, fly-on-the-wall documentary” and Copolla’s “decades-long journey in creating his self-financed passion project,” “Megadoc” features unfiltered cast interviews with the likes of Adam Driver, Aubrey Plaza, Shia LaBeouf, Laurence Fishburne and Dustin Hoffman, as well as fellow director George Lucas.
According to Utopia, Figgis will be traveling to New York and L.A. for the opening and will be hosting a few retrospective screenings of some of his legendary films, including a new 4K Restoration of “Leaving Las Vegas” (celebrating its 30th anniversary this year) at the Roxy Cinema in New York and American Cinematheque in L.A."}]}

It premiered at the 82nd Venice International Film Festival in August 2025. Coppola later asked Figgis to be involved with an edition of his magazine *All-Story* and Figgis stayed in touch with the magazine's editor Michael Ray; when Coppola eventually began production on *Megalopolis* \"Megalopolis (film)\"), Ray mentioned this to Figgis. In preparing to make the film, Figgis read Sam Wasson's *The Path to Paradise: A Francis Ford Coppola Story* and *Notes on a Life* by Eleanor Coppola, whom he also asked for advice due to her involvement in making *Hearts of Darkness: A Filmmaker's Apocalypse*, the behind-the-scenes documentary of Francis Ford Coppola's *Apocalypse Now*.","score":0.6892434,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://variety.com/2025/film/global/megadoc-things-we-learned-francis-ford-coppola-megalopolis-1236500604","title":"'Megadoc': 5 Things We Learned From Mike Figgis Doc on ' ...","content":"He also nailed some unfiltered interviews with “Megalopolis” actors Shia LaBeouf, Aubrey Plaza, Jon Voight and Dustin Hoffman, as well as Adam","score":0.65940565,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.instagram.com/reel/DRxH6JhDjrL?hl=en","title":"#megadoc - 9/10 .
